message:
test(semantic_quality): add 47 edge case tests for ranking metrics and threshold violations (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Covers precision@k, recall@k, NDCG@k, MRR computation with known inputs,
dedup/truncation, threshold violation detection per-metric and boundary,
summarization averaging, RRF k sensitivity, hybrid fusion, empty inputs,
serde roundtrips for all public types, and determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
